351.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Babies would be brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he would chew a date and rub it on their palates and supplicate blessings for them. A baby urinated in his lap, so he called for water and poured it over the spot of the urine.'
351.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Bayi-bayi dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau mengunyah kurma dan menggosokkannya ke langit-langit mulut mereka serta mendoakan keberkahan untuk mereka. Seorang bayi kencing di pangkuannya, maka beliau meminta air dan menuangkannya di atas tempat kencing itu.'

352.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I told him about a woman who prays throughout the night and does not sleep. He disapproved of that until I could see the displeasure on his face. Then he said: "You must take on only as much worship as you are able, for Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, does not tire until you tire."'
352.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memberitahunya tentang seorang wanita yang shalat sepanjang malam dan tidak tidur. Beliau tidak menyukainya hingga aku bisa melihat ketidaksenangan di wajahnya. Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Kalian harus melakukan hanya sebatas ibadah yang kalian mampu, karena Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung tidak bosan hingga kalian yang bosan."'

353.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The bed of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ upon which he and his family slept was made of leather stuffed with palm fiber.'
353.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tempat tidur Rasulullah ﷺ yang digunakan beliau dan keluarganya untuk tidur terbuat dari kulit yang diisi dengan serat pelepah kurma.'

354.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ entered the house, he said to Abu Bakr: 'Send away those who are with you.' He said: 'There is no concern — they are only my two daughters.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, has granted me permission to depart to Madinah.' Abu Bakr said: 'O Messenger of Allah, let me be your companion.' He said: 'As a companion.' Abu Bakr then offered one of the two riding camels he had been keeping and preparing for when permission came — and the Prophet ﷺ accepted.
354.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ masuk ke rumah, beliau berkata kepada Abu Bakar: 'Keluarkan orang-orang yang bersamamu.' Ia berkata: 'Tidak ada masalah — mereka hanya dua putriku.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung telah mengizinkanku untuk berangkat ke Madinah.' Abu Bakar berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, izinkanlah aku menemanimu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Sebagai teman perjalanan.' Abu Bakar kemudian menawarkan salah satu dari dua unta tunggangan yang telah ia rawat dan persiapkan untuk saat izin datang — dan Nabi ﷺ menerimanya.

355.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'It is as if I can still see the gleam of perfume in the parting of the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ days later — while he was in a state of ihram.'
355.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seakan-akan aku masih bisa melihat kilau wewangian di belahan rambut Rasulullah ﷺ beberapa hari kemudian — sementara beliau dalam keadaan ihram.'

356.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He would then send them off while he remained among us in a state of non-ihram.'
356.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa menganyam kalung untuk hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ. Kemudian beliau mengirimnya sementara beliau tetap di antara kami dalam keadaan tidak berihram.'

357.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ was about to depart, he was told that Safiyyah bint Huyayy had started her menses. He said: 'She will surely delay us.' They said: 'She already performed Tawaf of the House on the Day of Sacrifice.' He said: 'Then let her depart.'
357.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ akan berangkat, diberitahu bahwa Shafiyyah binti Huyay sedang haid. Beliau bersabda: 'Ia pasti akan menunda kita.' Mereka berkata: 'Ia sudah melakukan Tawaf di Ka'bah pada hari Idul Adha.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kalau begitu biarkanlah ia berangkat.'

358.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to scrape semen off the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he would pray in it.'
358.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa mengikis mani dari pakaian Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau shalat dengan pakaian itu.'

359.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I can tell when you are angry and when you are pleased. When you are angry, you say: "No, by the Lord of Ibrahim!" And when you are pleased, you say: "No, by the Lord of Muhammad!"'
359.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku bisa tahu kapan kamu marah dan kapan kamu senang. Ketika kamu marah, kamu berkata: "Tidak, demi Tuhan Ibrahim!" Dan ketika kamu senang, kamu berkata: "Tidak, demi Tuhan Muhammad!"'

360.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, all your wives have a kunya except me.' He said: 'You are Umm Abd Allah.'
360.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, semua istrimu memiliki kuniyah kecuali aku.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kamu adalah Umm Abd Allah.'

361.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray thirteen rak'ahs during the night.
361.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat tiga belas rakaat di malam hari.

362.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, a hadith similar in meaning to the one narrated by Muhammad ibn al-Ash'ath — meaning ibn Qays.
362.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, sebuah hadis yang serupa maknanya dengan yang diriwayatkan oleh Muhammad bin al-Asy'ats — yaitu bin Qais.

363.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to say: 'O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done and from the evil of what I have not done.'
363.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mengucapkan: 'Ya Allah, aku berlindung kepada-Mu dari keburukan apa yang telah aku lakukan dan dari keburukan apa yang belum aku lakukan.'

364.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ recited the verse: 'Then for him is rest and provision and a garden of pleasure' (56:89).
364.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ membaca ayat: 'Maka baginya ketenangan dan rezeki serta surga yang penuh kenikmatan' (56:89).

365.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ stood and addressed the people in the case of Barirah. He praised Allah and then said: 'What is the matter with men who stipulate conditions that are not in the Book of Allah? Every condition that is not in the Book of Allah is invalid. The Book of Allah is more worthy of compliance, and its condition is more binding. Loyalty of clientage belongs to whoever grants the emancipation.'
365.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berdiri dan berbicara kepada orang-orang dalam kasus Barirah. Beliau memuji Allah kemudian bersabda: 'Ada apa dengan orang-orang yang menetapkan syarat yang tidak ada dalam Kitab Allah? Setiap syarat yang tidak ada dalam Kitab Allah adalah batal. Kitab Allah lebih layak untuk dipatuhi, dan syaratnya lebih mengikat. Wala (perwalian) adalah milik orang yang membebaskan.'

366.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she denied that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ever urinated while standing after the Quran was revealed to him, saying: 'He has not urinated standing since the Quran was revealed to him.'
366.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia membantah bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ pernah kencing sambil berdiri setelah Al-Qur'an diturunkan kepadanya, seraya berkata: 'Beliau tidak pernah kencing sambil berdiri sejak Al-Qur'an diturunkan kepadanya.'

367.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a heavy and slow-moving woman sought permission from the Prophet ﷺ to depart from Muzdalifah before the rest of the group. He gave her permission. Aisha said: 'I wish I had sought the same permission.'
367.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita yang bertubuh besar dan lambang bergerak meminta izin kepada Nabi ﷺ untuk berangkat dari Muzdalifah sebelum rombongan lainnya. Beliau mengizinkannya. Aisyah berkata: 'Andai saja aku juga meminta izin yang sama.'

368.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ returned from a journey and found that she had covered something with a cloth that had images on it. He removed it. She then made two cushions from it.
368.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ kembali dari perjalanan dan mendapati ia telah menutup sesuatu dengan kain yang bergambar. Beliau menyingkirkannya. Ia kemudian membuat dua bantal darinya.

369.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I perfumed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with these two hands of mine when he entered the state of ihram and after he stoned the Jamarat, before he performed the Tawaf of Visiting.'
369.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memewangikan Rasulullah ﷺ dengan kedua tanganku ini ketika beliau memasuki keadaan ihram dan setelah beliau melempar jumrah, sebelum beliau melakukan Tawaf Ziyarah.'

370.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man came to visit her and she said he was her brother through breastfeeding. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Be careful about who has breastfed you, for breastfeeding is from hunger.' Abd al-Rahman reported: 'Look carefully at who your brothers are — for breastfeeding is from hunger.'
370.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki datang mengunjunginya dan ia menyebutnya sebagai saudara susunya. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Berhati-hatilah tentang siapa yang menyusuimu, karena persusuan itu timbul dari rasa lapar.' Abd al-Rahman meriwayatkan: 'Periksalah dengan teliti siapa saudara-saudaramu — karena persusuan itu timbul dari rasa lapar.'

371.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the nightly routine of the Prophet ﷺ: if he had been intimate with his wife, he would sleep in that state without touching water. At the first call to prayer, he would rise. If he was in a state of ritual impurity, he would pour water over himself — but she did not say he performed a full bath nor ablution as for prayer — then he would pray two rak'ahs and go out to the mosque.
371.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan rutinitas malam Nabi ﷺ: jika beliau telah berhubungan dengan istrinya, beliau tidur dalam keadaan itu tanpa menyentuh air. Pada azan pertama, beliau bangkit. Jika beliau dalam keadaan junub, beliau menuangkan air ke atas dirinya — namun ia tidak mengatakan bahwa beliau mandi besar atau berwudhu untuk shalat — kemudian beliau shalat dua rakaat dan keluar ke masjid.

372.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I would gnaw at a bone while I was menstruating, then hand it to the Prophet ﷺ and he would place his mouth at the same spot where I had gnawed.'
372.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa menggerogoti tulang sementara aku sedang haid, lalu menyerahkannya kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau meletakkan mulutnya di tempat yang sama dengan tempatku menggerogoti.'

373.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The blood of a Muslim is not lawful except in one of three cases: a man who kills and is killed in retaliation, a man who commits adultery after being married, or a man who apostatizes after embracing Islam.'
373.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Darah seorang Muslim tidak halal kecuali dalam salah satu dari tiga hal: seorang laki-laki yang membunuh dan dibunuh sebagai balasan, seorang laki-laki yang berzina setelah menikah, atau seorang laki-laki yang murtad setelah memeluk Islam.'

374.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away, he was shrouded in three white Yemeni cotton garments — with no shirt and no turban among them.
374.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ wafat, beliau dikafani dalam tiga kain putih Yaman yang terbuat dari kapas — tidak ada kemeja maupun surban di antaranya.

375.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Ibn Umar mentioned that the Prophet ﷺ said to her: 'Hand me the prayer mat.' She said: 'I am menstruating.' He said: 'Your menstruation is not in your hand.'
375.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Ibnu Umar menyebutkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Berikan aku sajadah.' Ia berkata: 'Aku sedang haid.' Beliau bersabda: 'Haidmu tidak ada di tanganmu.'

376.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked about who should lead the prayer during the Prophet's ﷺ illness, and she remained silent. When asked about Umar, he remained silent again. When asked about Uthman, he said: 'Yes.' So they sent for Uthman, who came. The Prophet ﷺ spoke privately with him, and Uthman's face began to change color.
376.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya tentang siapa yang harus mengimami shalat selama sakit Nabi ﷺ, beliau diam. Ketika ditanya tentang Umar, beliau diam lagi. Ketika ditanya tentang Utsman, beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Maka mereka mengirim untuk Utsman, yang pun datang. Nabi ﷺ berbicara secara pribadi dengannya, dan wajah Utsman mulai berubah.

377.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'My necklace was stolen and I cursed the one who took it. The Prophet ﷺ said: "Do not lighten his burden for him — leave him to his sin."'
377.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kalungku dicuri dan aku mengutuk orang yang mengambilnya. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Jangan ringankan bebannya — biarkan dia dengan dosanya."'

378.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) and Ibn Abbas that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ delayed the Tawaf on the Day of Sacrifice until the night.
378.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dan Ibnu Abbas bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menunda Tawaf pada hari Idul Adha hingga malam hari.

379.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to kiss while fasting.
379.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mencium sementara beliau sedang berpuasa.

380.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away while we were full from the two black things — water and dates.'
380.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ wafat sementara kami kenyang dari dua hal yang hitam — air dan kurma.'

381.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ looked at the moon and said: 'O Aisha, seek refuge in Allah from the evil of this, for this is al-Ghasiq when it darkens.'
381.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memandang bulan dan bersabda: 'Wahai Aisyah, berlindunglah kepada Allah dari kejahatan ini, karena inilah al-Ghasiq ketika ia gelap.'

382.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding a woman who sees suspicious discharge after becoming pure: 'That is only a vein — or veins.'
382.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai seorang wanita yang melihat cairan yang mencurigakan setelah bersuci: 'Itu hanyalah sebuah pembuluh darah — atau pembuluh-pembuluh darah.'

383.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Believers are subject to more trials. There is no believer who is struck by a stumble, a thorn, or any pain, except that Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, raises him a degree because of it and removes from him a sin — or words to that effect.'
383.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang-orang beriman lebih banyak mendapat cobaan. Tidak ada seorang mukmin yang ditimpa tersandung, duri, atau rasa sakit apa pun, melainkan Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung mengangkatnya satu derajat karenanya dan menghapuskan darinya suatu dosa — atau kalimat semakna dengan itu.'

384.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray between Isha — which you call al-Atamah — and Fajr: eleven prostrations, with a taslim between every two prostrations, and Witr with one. His prostration lasted as long as it takes one of you to recite fifty verses. When the muadhdhin fell silent at the first call for Fajr prayer, he would perform two brief rak'ahs and then lie on his right side.'
384.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat antara Isya — yang kalian sebut al-Atamah — dan Subuh: sebelas sujud, dengan salam di antara setiap dua sujud, dan Witr satu rakaat. Sujudnya berlangsung selama salah seorang dari kalian membaca lima puluh ayat. Ketika muadzin selesai pada azan pertama untuk shalat Subuh, beliau melakukan dua rakaat ringan kemudian berbaring di sisi kanan.'

385.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray the Duha prayer voluntarily, but I do pray it.'
385.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah shalat Dhuha secara sukarela, namun aku shalat Dhuha.'

386.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ delayed the Isha prayer one night, and when he came out he said: 'None of the people wait for this prayer except you.' — This was before Islam had spread widely among the people.
386.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengakhirkan shalat Isya satu malam, dan ketika beliau keluar beliau bersabda: 'Tidak ada seorang pun dari kalangan manusia yang menunggu shalat ini kecuali kalian.' — Ini terjadi sebelum Islam tersebar luas di antara orang-orang.

387.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I never saw anyone more prompt in praying Dhuhr than the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
387.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat seorang pun yang lebih cepat dalam melakukan shalat Zuhur daripada Rasulullah ﷺ.'

388.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was told to change her garment, so she placed the one she had on aside. When she showed him a striped cloth, she said: 'Whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw it on a garment, he would cut it off.' So she did not wear it.
388.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia disuruh mengganti pakaiannya, maka ia meletakkan pakaian yang dipakainya. Ketika ia menunjukkan kain bergaris-garis, ia berkata: 'Setiap kali Rasulullah ﷺ melihatnya pada pakaian, beliau memotongnya.' Maka ia pun tidak memakainya.

389.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the matter of a man who had a wet dream and then fasted: Marwan said to go to Abu Hurayra and inform him. Abu Hurayra said: 'He is my neighbor and I dislike confronting him with something he dislikes. But the governor has insisted.' So he went to him and told him. Abu Hurayra said: 'al-Fadl ibn Abbas told it to me.'
389.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai seorang laki-laki yang bermimpi basah lalu berpuasa: Marwan berkata untuk pergi menemui Abu Hurairah dan memberitahunya. Abu Hurairah berkata: 'Ia adalah tetanggaku dan aku tidak suka menghadapinya dengan sesuatu yang tidak ia sukai. Tetapi gubernur telah bersikeras.' Maka ia pergi menemuinya dan memberitahunya. Abu Hurairah berkata: 'al-Fadhl bin Abbas memberitahukannya kepadaku.'

390.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'One or two sucklings do not establish the prohibition of marriage.'
390.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Satu atau dua kali isapan tidak menetapkan haramnya pernikahan.'

391.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the character of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and she replied: 'His character was the Quran.'
391.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang akhlak Rasulullah ﷺ, dan ia menjawab: 'Akhlaknya adalah Al-Qur'an.'

392.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would sleep while in a state of ritual impurity. She replied: 'Yes — but he would not sleep until he had washed his private parts and performed ablution as for prayer.'
392.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ tidur dalam keadaan junub. Ia menjawab: 'Ya — tetapi beliau tidak tidur hingga mencuci kemaluannya dan berwudhu sebagaimana wudhu untuk shalat.'

393.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that two men came to ask her a question but felt shy and got up to leave. She said: 'What is it? Ask about whatever you wish.' They said: 'Did the Prophet ﷺ engage in intimate contact while fasting?' She said: 'He used to do that, but he had greater control over his desires than any of you.'
393.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dua orang datang untuk bertanya kepadanya tetapi merasa malu dan berdiri untuk pergi. Ia berkata: 'Ada apa? Tanyakanlah apa saja yang kalian inginkan.' Mereka berkata: 'Apakah Nabi ﷺ bercumbu sementara sedang berpuasa?' Ia berkata: 'Beliau biasa melakukan itu, tetapi beliau memiliki pengendalian diri yang lebih besar atas syahwatnya daripada kalian semua.'

394.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ bathed from ritual impurity. She called for a vessel which she estimated to hold about a sa' by your current measure.
394.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang bagaimana Rasulullah ﷺ mandi dari janabah. Ia meminta sebuah bejana yang ia perkirakan berisi sekitar satu sha' dengan takaran kalian yang berlaku sekarang.

395.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I perfumed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ both for his coming out of ihram and for his entering it.'
395.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memewangikan Rasulullah ﷺ baik untuk keluar dari ihram maupun untuk memasukinya.'

396.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to send sacrificial animals, and I would twist their garlands with my own hands. He would then not abstain from anything from which a non-pilgrim is not required to abstain.'
396.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengirimkan hewan kurban, dan aku menganyam kalungnya dengan tanganku sendiri. Kemudian beliau tidak berpantang dari apa pun yang tidak diwajibkan bagi orang yang tidak berhaji untuk berpantang.'

397.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'He used to pray nine rak'ahs during the night.' She was asked: 'Standing or sitting?' She replied: 'He would pray some nights standing for a long time and other nights sitting for a long time. When he recited standing, he would bow standing; when he recited sitting, he would bow sitting. And he would pray two rak'ahs before the Fajr prayer.'
397.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Beliau biasa shalat sembilan rakaat di malam hari.' Ia ditanya: 'Berdiri atau duduk?' Ia menjawab: 'Beliau shalat beberapa malam sambil berdiri lama dan malam-malam lain sambil duduk lama. Ketika membaca sambil berdiri, beliau ruku dalam keadaan berdiri; ketika membaca sambil duduk, beliau ruku dalam keadaan duduk. Dan beliau shalat dua rakaat sebelum shalat Subuh.'

398.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Avoid rhyming in supplication, for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and his companions did not do that.' She also said: 'Address people once a week. If you insist, then twice; and if you insist, then three times. But do not tire the people of this Book. And do not let me find you coming to a gathering while they are already in conversation.'
398.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Hindarilah bersajak dalam doa, karena Rasulullah ﷺ dan para sahabatnya tidak melakukan hal itu.' Ia juga berkata: 'Berbicara kepada orang-orang sekali seminggu. Jika engkau bersikeras, maka dua kali; dan jika engkau bersikeras, maka tiga kali. Tetapi jangan membosankan orang-orang dengan Kitab ini. Dan jangan biarkan aku mendapatimu datang kepada suatu kaum sementara mereka sedang berbincang-bincang.'

399.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to say during the prostration of Quranic recitation at night — repeating it several times in a single prostration: 'My face has prostrated to the One who created it, split open its hearing and its sight, by His power and His might.'
399.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mengucapkan dalam sujud tilawah Al-Qur'an di malam hari — mengulangnya beberapa kali dalam satu sujud: 'Wajahku bersujud kepada Dzat yang menciptakannya, yang membelah pendengarannya dan penglihatannya, dengan kekuasaan dan kekuatan-Nya.'

400.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray in the same garment in which he had been intimate with his wife.'
400.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dengan mengenakan pakaian yang sama yang dipakainya ketika berhubungan dengan istrinya.'
